title: Bassovia pohliana
taxonomy: Bassovia pohliana is a species within the family of Annonaceae. This family belongs to the order of Magnoliales, a group of flowering plants. The order Magnoliales is part of the larger clade of Magnoliidae, which is a group of flowering plants that are thought to be among the most ancient.
